overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest trail during a dramatic twilight with vibrant pink and teal skies. The character moves steadily through atmospheric fog with two swords visible on his back, transitioning from open grassland to denser woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with grassy verges

events.description: stone wall along right side of path ends, opening into wider grassy field

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords on his back, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small stones
low stone wall running alongside the right edge of the path
lush green grass covering the ground on both sides of the trail
dramatic dusk sky with vibrant pink and teal cloud formations
tall pine trees scattered across the landscape in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a third-person view of Geralt walking along a dirt forest trail at twilight. A stone wall runs briefly along the right side before giving way to open grassland. The sky displays striking pink and teal colors through scattered clouds, while sparse pine trees line the horizon.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path at steady pace, moving through open grassland with scattered trees

entered.detail: clusters of deciduous and pine trees growing closer to the path

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through open woodland with grass verges on both sides. Trees move closer to the path from the distance, transitioning from scattered specimens to denser clusters. The colorful twilight sky remains fully visible overhead as the path gently curves through the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed forest corridor with dense tree cover

events.description: path curves to the left, character follows the bend through denser forest

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding path as it curves left through increasingly dense forest, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: tall dense trees forming a canopy overhead and closing in on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a denser forest section where trees close in on both sides of the trail, partially obscuring the twilight sky. The path becomes more enclosed and darker as the vegetation thickens. Near the end, the trail curves gently to the left as Geralt continues his journey deeper into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a dirt trail transitions from an open, colorful grassland into a dense and enclosing forest. It begins with Geralt walking past a brief stone wall under a striking pink and teal twilight sky, with sparse pine trees dotting the distant horizon. As the path continues, the landscape shifts from open verges to woodland, with scattered trees gradually clustering closer to the trail. The scene then moves into a thicker forest section where the canopy closes in from both sides, partially obscuring the vibrant sky and casting the environment into deeper shadow. Finally, the trail curves gently to the left as the vegetation thickens, leading the character deeper into the darkened woods.
